project.name: Kalshi Market Scorer
project.description: A Python system that scores live Kalshi prediction-market contracts for trade ideas. It pulls signals from many sources (weather/GEFS ensembles, polls, Polymarket prices & whale wallets, X/Twitter via Grok, sportsbook odds, order-flow microstructure, GDELT mentions, Love Island teasers), scores edge deterministically, applies adversarial challenge and Kelly risk sizing, then publishes trade ideas to a FastAPI dashboard. Also places/cancels Kalshi orders (demo by default; prod gated) and manages open positions.

nodes.name: state.py
nodes.summary: Defines the dashboard's shared DashboardState container and a factory that wires the Kalshi clients, snapshot store, scanner, and scorer from environment configuration.

nodes.name: DashboardState
nodes.summary: Dataclass holding all shared dashboard runtime state — clients, executor, snapshot store, scanner, scorer, cached universe, and the current scored slate — with a close method for teardown.

nodes.name: create_dashboard_state
nodes.summary: Factory that reads environment configuration (Kalshi env, categories, markets file) and constructs the clients, snapshot store, scanner, and scorer into a DashboardState.

nodes.name: grouping.py
nodes.summary: Groups scored markets by event, computes per-event averages and signal coverage, and serializes event groups into dashboard payloads enriched with bias and microstructure estimates.

nodes.name: group_by_event
nodes.summary: Buckets ranked scored markets by their event key, computing each group's average score, market count, and best market, then sorts groups.

nodes.name: serialize_event_group
nodes.summary: Serializes an event group's best market into a dashboard dict, attaching microstructure and bias signal estimates, coverage, time-to-close, and a safe market URL.

nodes.name: coverage_fraction
nodes.summary: Computes the fraction of weighted signals that have non-zero coverage for a scored market, indicating signal completeness.

nodes.name: link_resolver.py
nodes.summary: Resolves canonical Kalshi event page URLs by generating slug candidates, fetching pages, and validating the resulting title against the event, with retry and delay support.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses urllib with an unverified SSL context and regex-based HTML title extraction rather than a parsing library.

nodes.name: resolve_event_link
nodes.summary: Iterates slug candidates for an event, fetching and validating each candidate page until a matching canonical URL is found, recording all attempts.

nodes.name: slug_candidates
nodes.summary: Builds an ordered, de-duplicated list of slug candidates from series and event titles plus optional extras for URL resolution.

nodes.name: validate_event_page
nodes.summary: Validates fetched HTML by extracting the page title and confirming it references the event ticker or shares meaningful terms with the expected title.

nodes.name: fetch_series_title
nodes.summary: Fetches a series title from the Kalshi API by series ticker, parsing the JSON response.

nodes.name: market_snapshot.py
nodes.summary: Serializes and deserializes Market objects to and from JSON snapshot and checkpoint files, with optional expiry filtering on load.

nodes.name: load_snapshot
nodes.summary: Loads a market snapshot JSON file into Market objects, optionally filtering out markets that have expired relative to a given time.

nodes.name: _dict_to_market
nodes.summary: Reconstructs a Market dataclass from a serialized dict, parsing the ISO close time back into a datetime.

nodes.name: mentions_report.py
nodes.summary: Ranks scored mentions-signal rows and renders them into a human-readable report with speaker, window, probabilities, and safe market links.

nodes.name: rank_and_render
nodes.summary: Sorts scored mention rows by score and renders the top-N into formatted text lines with speaker, window, base rate, and market URL.

nodes.name: models.py
nodes.summary: Central domain model module defining the dataclasses and enums (Market, TradeIdea, Position, Candle, ScoredMarket, SignalEstimate, ScanResult, and more) shared across the trading system.
nodes.languageNotes: A flat collection of dataclasses and enums acting as the shared type vocabulary for the whole package.

nodes.name: Market
nodes.summary: Dataclass representing a Kalshi market with ticker, event/series identifiers, bid/ask, last price, volume, open interest, category, close time, and status.

nodes.name: ScoredMarket
nodes.summary: Dataclass wrapping a Market with its composite score and the full set of individual signal sub-scores and signed microstructure metrics.

nodes.name: SignalEstimate
nodes.summary: Dataclass holding a single signal's probability estimate, uncertainty, weight, issue time, and metadata, with a helper for computing staleness in minutes.

nodes.name: TradeIdea
nodes.summary: Dataclass capturing a proposed trade: agent id, ticker, side, action, confidence, market price, reasoning, signal sources, suggested size, and category.

nodes.name: portfolio_checks.py
nodes.summary: Deterministic position-exit checks that emit stop-loss and profit-target exit signals based on a position's unrealized P&L thresholds.

nodes.name: check_stop_loss
nodes.summary: Returns a stop-loss ExitSignal when a position's unrealized loss breaches the configured threshold.

nodes.name: check_profit_target
nodes.summary: Returns a profit-target ExitSignal when a position's unrealized gain reaches the configured threshold.

nodes.name: scanner.py
nodes.summary: Core market scanner that fetches open Kalshi markets, enriches categories, filters by category and expiry, refreshes live prices in batches, and drives scoring with order-flow and orderbook enrichment.
nodes.languageNotes: Heavy use of asyncio.gather with a bounded semaphore for concurrent per-market trade and orderbook fetches, plus a degraded-state fallback path.

nodes.name: MarketScanner
nodes.summary: Orchestrates a full scan: fetches and parses open markets, enriches categories, applies live prices with a missing-price policy, refreshes a shortlist, and runs the scorer end to end.

nodes.name: filter_markets
nodes.summary: Filters a list of markets by normalized category and removes markets that have already closed relative to the current time.

nodes.name: ScannerConfig
nodes.summary: Configuration dataclass for the scanner controlling live-price batch size, shortlist price-age tolerance, and the missing-live-price policy.

nodes.name: microstructure.py
nodes.summary: Computes signed microstructure metrics (momentum, order-flow imbalance, orderbook skew, range position) and folds them into a directional SignalEstimate for a market.

nodes.name: estimate_from_signed
nodes.summary: Blends signed momentum, OFI, skew, and range-position components with config-driven weights into a bounded probability SignalEstimate with explanatory metadata.

nodes.name: build_microstructure_estimate
nodes.summary: Top-level entry that derives the signed microstructure metrics from candles, trades, and orderbook data and produces the combined SignalEstimate.

nodes.name: signed_ofi
nodes.summary: Computes a signed order-flow-imbalance value from recent trades, where the sign indicates net buy or sell aggression.

nodes.name: signed_orderbook_skew
nodes.summary: Computes a signed orderbook depth-skew value near the mid price, capturing directional resting-liquidity pressure.

nodes.name: weather_report.py
nodes.summary: Scores and ranks weather markets against a model probability, flags suspect edges, and renders a ranked Markdown table of weather trade candidates.

nodes.name: ScoredWeatherMarket
nodes.summary: Dataclass holding a scored weather market: ticker, forecast point, side, model probability, fair value, bid/ask, edge, volume, location, metric, and suspect flag.

nodes.name: rank_and_render
nodes.summary: Flags suspect edges, ranks scored weather markets, and renders a Markdown report including a separate table of suspect candidates.

nodes.name: score_sides
nodes.summary: Compares a model probability against the yes bid and ask to determine which side carries edge and by how many cents.

nodes.name: render_table
nodes.summary: Renders a list of ranked weather markets into Markdown table rows with ticker links, side, fair value, and bid/ask cells.

nodes.name: web_links.py
nodes.summary: Builds safe Kalshi market URLs by reducing any ticker to its series prefix, backed by a loadable series-slug map, the canonical helper used across the project.

nodes.name: kalshi_market_url
nodes.summary: Constructs a safe Kalshi market URL from a ticker by reducing it to its series prefix and applying any known series slug, avoiding non-resolving deep links.

nodes.name: load_series_slugs
nodes.summary: Loads the series-slug map from a JSON file, normalizing series keys to lowercase and stripping slug values.

nodes.name: Candle
nodes.summary: Dataclass representing a single price candle with timestamp, volume, open interest, and OHLC plus mean and previous price fields.

nodes.name: _retry.py
nodes.summary: Provides a generic async retry helper that re-invokes a coroutine with exponential backoff, used to harden Kalshi API calls against transient failures.

nodes.name: with_retry
nodes.summary: Awaits a coroutine function up to a configurable number of attempts, logging warnings and sleeping between retries before re-raising the final exception.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Package barrel for the actionability scoring subsystem, re-exporting the MarketScorer, signal helpers, and SnapshotStore for convenient import.

nodes.name: scorer.py
nodes.summary: Deterministic market actionability scorer that combines weighted volume, open-interest, momentum, and microstructure signals into a composite score and ranks markets.

nodes.name: MarketScorer
nodes.summary: Scores markets by blending candle-derived signals with a fixed weight map, supports live enrichment from order flow and orderbook skew, and re-ranks the slate.

nodes.name: signals.py
nodes.summary: Library of pure scoring functions that convert candle, spread, settlement-proximity, volume, momentum, order-flow, and orderbook data into normalized actionability sub-scores.

nodes.name: spread_penalty_multiplier
nodes.summary: Derives a penalty multiplier that discounts a market's score as its yes bid/ask spread widens, capping tradeability for illiquid contracts.

nodes.name: settlement_proximity_multiplier
nodes.summary: Computes a time-to-settlement multiplier from the market close time, boosting or dampening scores based on how soon the contract resolves.

nodes.name: relative_historical_volume_score
nodes.summary: Scores 24-hour volume relative to the daily candle history, flagging markets trading well above their typical baseline.

nodes.name: volume_spike_short_term_score
nodes.summary: Detects short-term volume spikes by comparing the most recent hourly candles against the prior baseline window.

nodes.name: oi_change_score
nodes.summary: Scores open-interest change across recent hourly candles to capture growing or shrinking position commitment.

nodes.name: momentum_score
nodes.summary: Measures recent price momentum from hourly candles, normalizing the magnitude of the latest move into a bounded score.

nodes.name: hl_position_score
nodes.summary: Scores where the current price sits within the high/low range of recent candle closes, highlighting breakout or mean-reversion setups.

nodes.name: ofi_score
nodes.summary: Computes an order-flow-imbalance score from a list of recent trades, weighting buy versus sell aggressor volume.

nodes.name: live_top_of_book
nodes.summary: Extracts the best bid and ask prices from a raw orderbook payload to provide live top-of-book quotes.

nodes.name: orderbook_skew_score
nodes.summary: Scores orderbook depth imbalance near the mid price, surfacing directional pressure from resting liquidity.

nodes.name: store.py
nodes.summary: SQLite-backed candle snapshot store that caches daily and hourly Kalshi candles with TTL staleness checks and async batched refresh from the API.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses sqlite3 directly with executemany upserts plus asyncio.gather and a semaphore for concurrent candle fetches.

nodes.name: SnapshotStore
nodes.summary: Manages a SQLite candle cache: tracks refresh timestamps, serves daily/hourly candles, upserts new candles in batches, and concurrently fetches stale tickers from the Kalshi client.

nodes.name: _candle_from_api
nodes.summary: Converts a raw Kalshi API candle payload into a typed Candle, deriving mid-price cents from bid/ask sub-fields.

nodes.name: market_scout.py
nodes.summary: Thin market-scout agent module that re-uses the event-grouping helpers to surface candidate markets for the scoring pipeline.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Dashboard package barrel that exposes the FastAPI app factory for the read-only ideas dashboard.

nodes.name: app.py
nodes.summary: FastAPI application factory for the read-only dashboard, configuring logging, a lifespan-managed background scoring loop, route registration, and a read-only safety assertion.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses FastAPI lifespan async context manager to launch and cancel the background scoring task.

nodes.name: create_app
nodes.summary: Builds and returns the configured FastAPI dashboard application, wiring routers, the index page, and read-only verification.

nodes.name: lifespan
nodes.summary: Async lifespan handler that creates dashboard state, launches the background scoring loop task on startup, and cancels it plus closes state on shutdown.

nodes.name: _assert_read_only
nodes.summary: Validates that the dashboard app only exposes read-only routes, raising at startup if any mutating route is registered.

nodes.name: portfolio_mapping.py
nodes.summary: Maps raw Kalshi balance, position, and order API payloads into dashboard-friendly dictionaries, computing exposure summaries and attaching safe market links.

nodes.name: map_position
nodes.summary: Transforms a raw Kalshi position into a normalized dict with cost basis, current value, P&L, category, and a derived market URL.

nodes.name: summarize_positions
nodes.summary: Aggregates mapped positions into exposure totals, per-category exposure breakdown, unrealized P&L, and open-position counts.

nodes.name: map_order
nodes.summary: Normalizes a raw Kalshi order payload into a dashboard dict with prices, sizes, side, status, and a safe market link.

nodes.name: map_balance
nodes.summary: Converts a raw Kalshi balance payload into dollar-denominated available, total, and timestamped balance fields.

nodes.name: routes.py
nodes.summary: FastAPI router exposing read-only dashboard endpoints for health, scored ideas, portfolio positions, and open orders, resolving live markets on demand.

nodes.name: ideas
nodes.summary: Endpoint returning the top-N scored event-group ideas from the current slate along with slate status and scan metadata.

nodes.name: portfolio
nodes.summary: Endpoint that concurrently fetches balance and positions from the live client, resolves market metadata, and returns a mapped, summarized portfolio view.

nodes.name: orders
nodes.summary: Endpoint that fetches open orders from the live client, resolves their markets, and returns mapped order dictionaries.

nodes.name: _resolve_markets
nodes.summary: Resolves a set of tickers to Market objects from the scored slate cache, fetching and parsing any missing ones concurrently via the live client.

nodes.name: health
nodes.summary: Health endpoint reporting slate status, generation time, slate age, and scan metadata for monitoring the dashboard.

nodes.name: scoring_loop.py
nodes.summary: Background scan loop for the dashboard that resolves the market universe, runs the scanner, groups scored markets by event, and refreshes the slate on an interval.

nodes.name: run_one_scan_cycle
nodes.summary: Executes a single scan cycle: resolves the universe, runs the scanner, groups results by event, and updates the dashboard slate state with timing and counts.

nodes.name: run_scoring_loop
nodes.summary: Long-running async loop that repeatedly invokes a scan cycle, logging and swallowing errors, then sleeping for the configured interval.

nodes.name: _resolve_universe
nodes.summary: Resolves the market universe from a cached snapshot file, reloading it off-thread when the file has changed on disk.

nodes.name: market_scorer.py
nodes.summary: Deterministic scoring helpers that compute a Kalshi-vs-Polymarket edge gap and decide profit-taking and stale-thesis exit conditions from configurable thresholds.

nodes.name: score_market
nodes.summary: Scores a market by comparing its implied probability to a Polymarket probability, computing the price gap and time-to-resolution weighting.

nodes.name: should_take_profit
nodes.summary: Decides whether a position has captured enough of its expected gap to warrant profit-taking, using a configurable threshold.

nodes.name: is_stale_thesis
nodes.summary: Flags a thesis as stale when sufficient time has elapsed without the expected price movement, per configurable bounds.

nodes.name: kalshi_bias.py
nodes.summary: CLI pipeline that runs the Kalshi bias signal for a market, either via the LLM agent or the deterministic build_bias_estimate path, and prints the estimate as JSON.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Parses CLI arguments and runs the Kalshi bias estimation for a ticker, emitting a JSON SignalEstimate.

nodes.name: market_maker.py
nodes.summary: CLI pipeline that instantiates the MarketMakerAgent for a ticker and prints its microstructure SignalEstimate as JSON.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Parses CLI arguments and runs the MarketMakerAgent, printing the resulting estimate as JSON.

nodes.name: order_flow.py
nodes.summary: CLI pipeline that instantiates the OrderFlowAgent for a ticker and prints its order-flow SignalEstimate as JSON.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Parses CLI arguments and runs the OrderFlowAgent, printing the resulting estimate as JSON.

nodes.name: polymarket_price.py
nodes.summary: CLI pipeline that runs the PolymarketPriceAgent for a ticker and prints the cross-venue price SignalEstimate as JSON.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Parses CLI arguments and runs the PolymarketPriceAgent, printing the resulting estimate as JSON.

nodes.name: polymarket_whale.py
nodes.summary: CLI pipeline that runs the PolymarketWhaleAgent for a ticker and prints the whale-flow SignalEstimate as JSON.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Parses CLI arguments and runs the PolymarketWhaleAgent, printing the resulting estimate as JSON.

nodes.name: sportsbook.py
nodes.summary: CLI pipeline that runs the sportsbook_signal for a ticker/title and prints the implied-probability SignalEstimate as JSON.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Parses CLI arguments and runs sportsbook_signal, printing the resulting estimate as JSON.

nodes.name: polymarket.py
nodes.summary: Deterministic builders that turn matched Polymarket prices and whale-entry data into SignalEstimate objects for the price and whale signals.

nodes.name: build_price_signal
nodes.summary: Builds a SignalEstimate from a Polymarket-implied probability and the cross-venue price gap, weighting confidence by match score.

nodes.name: build_whale_signal
nodes.summary: Aggregates validated whale entries into a directional SignalEstimate, parsing entry sides, sizes, and timestamps and weighting by recency and count.

nodes.name: sportsbook.py
nodes.summary: Sportsbook signal that detects the league, matches a market title to an ESPN event, and converts moneyline odds into a YES-probability SignalEstimate.

nodes.name: implied_yes_probability
nodes.summary: Maps a market title to the matching team/side in the moneyline probabilities and returns the implied YES probability.

nodes.name: build_estimate
nodes.summary: Constructs a SignalEstimate from a YES probability, sportsbook source, and matched team name with configurable confidence.

nodes.name: sportsbook_signal
nodes.summary: Top-level sportsbook signal that detects the league, fetches ESPN scoreboard/odds, matches the event, and returns the implied-probability estimate.

nodes.name: weather.py
nodes.summary: Core weather signal library that converts NWS forecasts, GEFS ensembles, and authority forecasts into probability-based SignalEstimates for weather threshold markets.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses scipy.stats.norm CDF/SF to convert ensemble spread into threshold-crossing probabilities, with settlement-degree rounding and observation-lock weighting.

nodes.name: observation_lock_fraction
nodes.summary: Computes how much of the settlement window is already locked in by elapsed observations, accounting for extreme-temperature lock hours.

nodes.name: _metric_to_probability
nodes.summary: Converts a forecast metric and threshold into a crossing probability using a normal distribution CDF/SF over the metric value, supporting range operators.

nodes.name: build_weather_signal
nodes.summary: Builds a SignalEstimate from a deterministic NWS forecast and discussion, converting the forecasted metric into a threshold-crossing probability.

nodes.name: build_ensemble_signal
nodes.summary: Builds a SignalEstimate from a GEFS ensemble, computing the threshold-crossing fraction across members with settlement rounding and observation-lock blending.

nodes.name: build_authority_signal
nodes.summary: Builds a SignalEstimate from an authoritative (e.g. NWS-station) forecast, deriving the threshold probability and freshness-weighted confidence.

nodes.name: config_manager.py
nodes.summary: Central tunable-configuration store that loads, validates, persists, and serves runtime parameters (with typed defaults) consumed across signals and agents.

nodes.name: ConfigManager
nodes.summary: Loads config from a JSON file (falling back to typed DEFAULTS), validates type-checked updates, persists changes, and exposes get/all accessors.

nodes.name: base.py
nodes.summary: Defines the shared BaseAgent that wraps the Anthropic AsyncAnthropic client and drives a multi-turn tool-use conversation loop for all signal agents.
nodes.languageNotes: Implements an async tool-calling loop over the Anthropic Messages API, dispatching tool_use blocks to registered handler callables.

nodes.name: BaseAgent
nodes.summary: Base agent that constructs an Anthropic async client and runs an iterative messages.create loop, routing tool-use requests to registered handlers and feeding tool results back.

nodes.name: data_orchestrator_agent.py
nodes.summary: Orchestration agent that aggregates per-market signal estimates, presents them to the LLM, and parses the resulting trade ideas into TradeIdea models.

nodes.name: _build_trade_idea
nodes.summary: Constructs a TradeIdea from ticker, side, confidence, reasoning and sizing inputs, normalizing fields into the model shape.

nodes.name: _parse_trade_ideas
nodes.summary: Extracts a JSON array of trade ideas from raw LLM text and deserializes each entry into a TradeIdea with Side/OrderAction enums.

nodes.name: DataOrchestratorAgent
nodes.summary: Agent that gathers signal estimates per ticker, prompts the LLM with aggregated market context, and exposes a tool handler that turns LLM output into TradeIdea objects.

nodes.name: kalshi_bias_agent.py
nodes.summary: Signal agent that estimates and corrects systematic Kalshi pricing biases (e.g. favorite-longshot, political markets) and emits a bias-adjusted SignalEstimate.

nodes.name: compute_bias_adjustment
nodes.summary: Computes a probability adjustment from market price, political flag, and resolution horizon using configurable favorite-longshot and horizon factors.

nodes.name: build_bias_estimate
nodes.summary: Builds a deterministic SignalEstimate from a market's price and metadata by applying the computed bias adjustment and confidence weighting.

nodes.name: KalshiBiasAgent
nodes.summary: LLM-backed bias agent that fetches market data, runs the prompt, parses estimates, and applies deterministic bias corrections before producing a bias SignalEstimate.

nodes.name: market_maker_agent.py
nodes.summary: Signal agent that parses Kalshi orderbooks, analyzes spread and depth dynamics, and produces a market-maker microstructure SignalEstimate.

nodes.name: _parse_orderbook
nodes.summary: Normalizes a raw Kalshi orderbook payload into best bid/ask, spread, and aggregate depth metrics.

nodes.name: analyze_spread_dynamics
nodes.summary: Analyzes a series of orderbook snapshots to detect spread tightening/widening trends and derive a directional microstructure read.

nodes.name: MarketMakerAgent
nodes.summary: Agent that fetches orderbooks, computes imbalance and spread dynamics, runs the LLM prompt, and assembles a market-maker SignalEstimate.

nodes.name: order_flow_agent.py
nodes.summary: Signal agent that computes order-flow imbalance (OFI) and VPIN toxicity from recent trades and emits an order-flow SignalEstimate.

nodes.name: _trade_dollar_volume
nodes.summary: Computes the dollar volume of a single trade from its price and count fields with defensive fallbacks.

nodes.name: compute_ofi
nodes.summary: Computes order-flow imbalance over a recent time window as the signed dollar-volume ratio of buyer- versus seller-initiated trades.

nodes.name: compute_vpin
nodes.summary: Computes the VPIN flow-toxicity metric by bucketing trades into equal dollar-volume buckets and averaging signed order imbalance.

nodes.name: OrderFlowAgent
nodes.summary: Agent that fetches recent trades, computes OFI and VPIN, runs the LLM prompt, and builds an order-flow SignalEstimate.

nodes.name: parsing.py
nodes.summary: Shared helpers that parse LLM output into SignalEstimate objects and serialize estimates back into JSON-friendly dicts, used by every signal agent.

nodes.name: parse_signal_estimates
nodes.summary: Extracts a JSON array from raw LLM text and deserializes each entry into a SignalEstimate, parsing timestamps and numeric fields defensively.

nodes.name: estimate_to_dict
nodes.summary: Serializes a SignalEstimate into a JSON-friendly dict, ISO-formatting the data_issued_at timestamp.

nodes.name: polymarket_price_agent.py
nodes.summary: Signal agent that matches a Kalshi market to its Polymarket counterpart, checks order-book depth and cross-venue price gaps, and emits a price-discrepancy SignalEstimate.

nodes.name: PolymarketPriceAgent
nodes.summary: Agent that finds the matching Polymarket market, validates book depth, computes the YES-price gap versus Kalshi, and builds a price SignalEstimate.

nodes.name: polymarket_whale_agent.py
nodes.summary: Signal agent that detects large (whale) Polymarket entries on the matched market and emits a whale-flow SignalEstimate.

nodes.name: PolymarketWhaleAgent
nodes.summary: Agent that loads whale targets, matches the Polymarket market, fetches large trades, detects whale entries, and builds a whale SignalEstimate.

nodes.name: consensus.py
nodes.summary: Filters and merges trade ideas by requiring agreement across a configurable minimum number of agents before a ticker/side is accepted.

nodes.name: apply_consensus
nodes.summary: Groups trade ideas by ticker and side, keeps only groups meeting the minimum-agent threshold, and emits one merged best-confidence idea per surviving group.

nodes.name: exit_monitor.py
nodes.summary: Monitors open trade entries against Polymarket prices to flag profit-taking, volume-spike, and stale-thesis exit conditions.

nodes.name: ExitMonitor
nodes.summary: Checks tracked trade entries against current Polymarket markets and returns exit signals for take-profit, volume spikes, and stale theses.

nodes.name: espn.py
nodes.summary: ESPN sportsbook client that fetches scoreboards and moneyline odds, converting American odds to de-vigged implied probabilities.

nodes.name: american_to_prob
nodes.summary: Converts an American moneyline value into an implied probability.

nodes.name: ESPNClient
nodes.summary: HTTP client that retrieves ESPN scoreboards and per-event moneyline odds, selecting a provider and returning de-vigged home/away probabilities.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Empty package marker that makes kalshi_trader an importable Python package and serves as the root of the trading system module tree.
nodes.languageNotes: Empty __init__.py acting as a Python package root barrel.

nodes.name: x_agent.py
nodes.summary: Agent that runs X (Twitter) search strategies via Grok to produce a sentiment/news signal estimate for a market, fanning out across category-specific strategies concurrently.

nodes.name: config.py
nodes.summary: Central runtime configuration module that loads .env values into the environment and exposes API keys, endpoints, and tunable trading parameters used across the system.

nodes.name: executor.py
nodes.summary: Translates a risk-approved trade idea into a concrete Kalshi order, computing contract count and limit price, and supports bulk cancellation of resting orders.

nodes.summary: Strategy hierarchy that defines X search query variants (sentiment, news, expert opinion, buzz) and converts Grok search results into normalized signal estimates.

nodes.summary: CLI pipeline wrapper that instantiates the XAgent for a single market and prints the resulting signal estimate as JSON for the orchestrator.

nodes.name: refresh_targets.py
nodes.summary: CLI utility that bootstraps and persists the Polymarket whale-wallet target list by scanning large trades and scoring wallet profitability.

nodes.name: CongressGovClient
